title: Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai
tagline: Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai (also called Oppillaselvar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Tiruchotruthurai, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai (also called Oppillaselvar Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Tiruchotruthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. The Five Rivers are Vadavaru, Vennaaru, Vettaaru, Kudamuruttiyaaru and Kaaviriyaaru. Shiva is worshiped as Odhanavaneswarar, and is represented by the lingam and his consort Parvati is depicted as Annapoorani. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil poet saints known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Kailasanathar Temple, Thingalur
topPlaces.description: The Chandiranaar Temple (also called Kailasanathar temple or Thingalur temple) is a Hindu temple in the village of Thingalur, 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) from Thanjavur and 33 kilometres (21 mi) from Kumbakonam on the Kumbakonam - Thiruvaiyaru road in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The presiding deity is Soma (moon).

topPlaces.name: Apathsahayar Temple, Thirupazhanam
topPlaces.description: Apathsahayar Temple, Thirupazhanam is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Thirupazhanam near Tiruvaiyaru, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is revered in the 7th century Tamil Saiva canonical work, the Tevaram, written by Tamil poet-saints known as the nayanars and classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam.

topPlaces.name: Vasishteswarar Temple, Thittai
topPlaces.description: Vasishteswarar Temple, located in the village of Thittai, is a Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva. The temple is located 11 kilometers north of Thanjavur city in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Thittai
topPlaces.description: Thittai also known as Thengudi Thittai is a village located in the Thanjavur taluk of Thanjavur district, in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.The village is renowned for its ancient Vasishteswarar Temple, an important center of Hindu worship and Dravidian architecture.

topPlaces.description: Manangorai is a village in the Thanjavur taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is the only village inside Thanjavur to have an Engineering college.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (48 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (50 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai?
faq.a: Stays in Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Odhanavaneswarar Temple, Tiruchotruturai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kailasanathar Temple, Thingalur, Apathsahayar Temple, Thirupazhanam, Vedapuriswarar Temple, Thiruvedhikudi, Vasishteswarar Temple, Thittai, Thittai.
